<content>1: # AgentCube Implementation Plan: AR-023 through AR-033
2: 
3: ## Overview
4: 
5: This document details the complete implementation of Architectural Requirements AR-023 through AR-033 for the AgentCube Kubernetes-native sandbox orchestration platform. Each AR results in complete, production-ready code with no placeholders or stubs.
6: 
7: ## AR-023: CLI Toolkit Implementation
8: 
9: ### Purpose
10: Command-line tool (`kubectl-agentcube`) for packaging, building, publishing, invoking, and checking status of AI agents against AgentCube or standard Kubernetes.
11: 
12: ### Files to Create
13: 
14: #### Core Configuration
15: - **`cmd/cli/pyproject.toml`**
16:   - Package `agentcube`
17:   - Dependencies: typer[all]>=0.9.0, pydantic>=2.0.0, pyyaml>=6.0, httpx>=0.24.0, docker>=6.0.0, rich>=13.0.0, packaging>=23.0, importlib-resources>=6.0.0, semver>=3.0.0
18:   - Optional dependencies: k8s (kubernetes>=28.0.0), dev (pytest>=7.4.0, pytest-asyncio>=0.21.0, pytest-cov>=4.1.0, ruff>=0.1.0, mypy>=1.5.0, pre-commit>=3.3.0, kubernetes>=28.0.0), test (pytest>=7.4.0, pytest-asyncio>=0.21.0, pytest-cov>=4.1.0, pytest-mock>=3.11.0, httpx-mock>=0.10.0)
19:   - Python >=3.10
20:   - Console script: `kubectl-agentcube = "agentcube.cli.main:app"`
21: 
22: - **`cmd/cli/agentcube/__init__.py`**
23:   - `__version__ = "0.1.0"`
24:   - `__author__ = "AgentCube Community"`
25:   - `__email__ = "agentcube@volcano.sh"`
26:   - Imports: `app`, `PackRuntime`, `BuildRuntime`, `PublishRuntime`, `InvokeRuntime`, `StatusRuntime`
27:   - `__all__ = ["app", "PackRuntime", "BuildRuntime", "PublishRuntime", "InvokeRuntime"]`
28: 
29: - **`cmd/cli/agentcube/cli/__init__.py`**
30:   - CLI subpackage marker with docstring
31: 
32: - **`cmd/cli/agentcube/cli/main.py`**
33:   - Typer app: `app = typer.Typer(name="agentcube", help="...", no_args_is_help=True, rich_markup_mode="rich", add_completion=False)`
34:   - Root callback `main()` with options:
35:     - `version: Optional[bool]` (eager, callback version_callback, --version, "Show version and exit")
36:     - `verbose: bool = typer.Option(False, "--verbose", "-v", "Enable verbose output")`
37:   - `version_callback(value)` - prints `AgentCube CLI (kubectl agentcube) version: {__version__}` and exits with `typer.Exit()`
38:   - Commands with `--verbose` local flag:
39:     - `pack(workspace=".", agent_name=None, language=None, entrypoint=None, port=None, build_mode=None, description=None, output=None, verbose=False)`
40:     - `build(workspace=".", proxy=None, cloud_provider=None, output=None, verbose=False)`
41:     - `publish(workspace=".", version=None, image_url=None, image_username=None, image_password=None, description=None, region=None, cloud_provider=None, provider="agentcube", node_port=None, replicas=None, namespace=None, verbose=False)`
42:     - `invoke(workspace=".", payload="{}", header_list=None, provider="agentcube", verbose=False)`
43:     - `status(workspace=".", provider="agentcube", verbose=False)`
44:   - `_handle_error(e, command_name, verbose)` - prints red error, optionally traceback with `traceback.print_exc()`, raises `typer.Exit(1)`
45: 
46: #### Data Models
47: - **`cmd/cli/agentcube/models/pack_models.py`**
48:   - `MetadataOptions` dataclass with optional fields: agent_name, language, entrypoint, port, build_mode, requirements_file, description, workload_manager_url, router_url, readiness_probe_path, readiness_probe_port, registry_url, registry_username, registry_password, agent_endpoint
49:   - Defaults: language="python", port=8080, build_mode="local"
50:   - Class method `from_options(cls, options)` creates instance from dict
51: 
52: #### Runtime Classes
53: - **`cmd/cli/agentcube/runtime/__init__.py`**
54:   - Re-exports: PackRuntime, BuildRuntime, PublishRuntime, InvokeRuntime, StatusRuntime, MetadataOptions
55: 
56: - **`cmd/cli/agentcube/runtime/pack_runtime.py`**
57:   - `PackRuntime` class with `__init__(verbose=False)`
58:   - `pack(workspace_path, **options)`:
59:     - Validates workspace with `_validate_workspace_structure`
60:     - Loads or creates metadata with `_load_or_create_metadata`
61:     - Applies CLI overrides with `_apply_option_overrides`
62:     - Validates language compatibility
63:     - Processes dependencies
64:     - Optionally generates Dockerfile
65:     - Updates pack metadata
66:     - Returns dict with agent_name, workspace_path, metadata_path
67:   - `_validate_workspace_structure(workspace_path)` - raises ValueError if not directory, Python requires *.py, Java requires pom.xml
68:   - `_load_or_create_metadata(workspace_path, options)` - loads agent_metadata.yaml with fallback to agent.yaml then metadata.yaml
69:   - `_apply_option_overrides(metadata, options)` - merges CLI options into metadata
70:   - `_validate_language_compatibility(workspace_path, metadata)` - delegates to language-specific validation
71:   - `_validate_python_compatibility(workspace_path)` - checks for *.py files
72:   - `_validate_java_compatibility(workspace_path)` - checks for pom.xml
73:   - `_process_dependencies(workspace_path, metadata)` - processes requirements.txt or pom.xml
74:   - `_process_python_dependencies(workspace_path)` - copies requirements.txt if present
75:   - `_process_java_dependencies(workspace_path)` - handles pom.xml
76:   - `_generate_dockerfile(workspace_path, metadata)` - returns path to generated Dockerfile
77:   - `_generate_python_dockerfile(metadata)` - generates Python Dockerfile content
78:   - `_generate_java_dockerfile(metadata)` - generates Java Dockerfile content
79:   - `_update_pack_metadata(workspace_path, metadata, dockerfile_path)` - saves metadata
80:   - `_prepare_output_path(workspace_path, output_path)` - resolves output directory
81:   - `_infer_entrypoint(workspace_path, language)` - guesses entrypoint
82: 
83: - **`cmd/cli/agentcube/runtime/build_runtime.py`**
84:   - `BuildRuntime` class with `__init__(verbose=False)`
85:   - `build(workspace_path, **options)`:
86:     - Validates prerequisites with `_validate_build_prerequisites`
87:     - Loads metadata
88:     - Increments version with `_increment_version`
89:     - Builds local or cloud image
90:     - Updates build metadata
91:     - Reverts version on build failure
92:     - Returns dict with image_name, image_id, image_size, tag
93:   - `_increment_version(workspace_path, metadata)` - patches version (X.Y.Z+1 or append .1)
94:   - `_validate_build_prerequisites(workspace_path)` - checks Docker availability
95:   - `_build_local(workspace_path, metadata, options)` - builds with DockerService.build_image
96:   - `_build_cloud(workspace_path, metadata, options)` - cloud build logic
97:   - `_update_build_metadata(workspace_path, metadata, build_result, tag="latest")` - saves image info
98: 
99: - **`cmd/cli/agentcube/runtime/publish_runtime.py`**
100:   - `PublishRuntime` class with `__init__(verbose=False, provider="agentcube")`
101:   - `publish(workspace_path, **options)`:
102:     - Validates provider and metadata
103:     - Prepares image with `_prepare_image_for_publishing`
104:     - Publishes via AgentCubeProvider or KubernetesProvider
105:     - Waits for deployment ready
106:     - Updates publish metadata
107:     - Returns dict with deployment info
108:   - `_publish_cr_to_k8s(workspace_path, metadata, **options)` - uses AgentCubeProvider.deploy_agent_runtime
109:   - `_publish_k8s(workspace_path, metadata, **options)` - uses KubernetesProvider.deploy_agent
110:   - `_prepare_image_for_publishing(workspace_path, metadata, options)` - pushes image or uses explicit URL
111:   - `_prepare_local_image(workspace_path, metadata, options)` - pushes via DockerService.push_image
112:   - `_prepare_cloud_image(workspace_path, metadata, options)` - cloud image preparation
113:   - `_update_publish_metadata(workspace_path, agent_info)` - saves deployment info
114: 
115: - **`cmd/cli/agentcube/runtime/invoke_runtime.py`**
116:   - `InvokeRuntime` class with `__init__(verbose=False, provider="agentcube")`
117:   - `invoke(workspace_path, payload, headers=None)`:
118:     - Validates with `_validate_invoke_prerequisites`
119:     - Determines endpoint based on provider and k8s_deployment
120:     - Rewrites URL for AgentRuntime: {base}/v1/namespaces/{namespace}/agent-runtimes/{agent_name}/invocations/
121:     - Adds X-Agentcube-Session-Id header if session_id in metadata
122:     - POSTs JSON payload
123:     - Returns response
124:   - `_validate_invoke_prerequisites(workspace_path)` - loads metadata, validates published state
125:   - `_invoke_agent_via_agentcube(agent_id, payload, headers, endpoint, workspace_path)` - async HTTP POST
126:   - `_direct_http_invocation(endpoint, payload, headers, workspace_path)` - direct HTTP POST
127: 
128: - **`cmd/cli/agentcube/runtime/status_runtime.py`**
129:   - `StatusRuntime` class with `__init__(verbose=False, provider="agentcube")`
130:   - `get_status(workspace_path, provider=None)`:
131:     - Loads metadata
132:     - Gets status via provider
133:     - Displays Rich Table
134:     - Exits with code 1 if not_published or error
135:     - Returns dict with status info
136:   - `_get_k8s_status(metadata)` - gets Deployment status via KubernetesProvider
137:   - `_get_cr_k8s_status(metadata)` - gets AgentRuntime CRD status via AgentCubeProvider
138: 
139: #### Service Classes
140: - **`cmd/cli/agentcube/services/__init__.py`**
141:   - Services package marker with docstring
142: 
143: - **`cmd/cli/agentcube/services/metadata_service.py`**
144:   - `AgentMetadata` Pydantic BaseModel with all metadata fields and validators
145:   - Validators: `validate_language` (python, java), `validate_build_mode` (local, cloud), `validate_port` (1-65535)
146:   - `MetadataService` class with `__init__(verbose=False)`
147:   - `load_metadata(workspace_path)` - loads agent_metadata.yaml with fallback
148:   - `save_metadata(workspace_path, metadata)` - saves to agent_metadata.yaml with yaml.dump
149:   - `update_metadata(workspace_path, updates)` - updates and saves
150:   - `validate_workspace(workspace_path)` - validates workspace structure
151:   - `_validate_python_workspace(workspace_path, metadata)` - Python-specific validation
152:   - `_validate_java_workspace(workspace_path, metadata)` - Java-specific validation
153: 
154: - **`cmd/cli/agentcube/services/docker_service.py`**
155:   - `DockerService` class with `__init__(verbose=False)`
156:   - `check_docker_available()` - returns bool
157:   - `build_image(dockerfile_path, context_path, image_name, tag, build_args)` - builds with tag, returns dict
158:   - `get_image_info(image_name)` - returns dict with id, size, created
159:   - `_get_image_info(image_name)` - internal image info retrieval
160:   - `_format_size(size_bytes)` - formats bytes to human-readable
161:   - `push_image(image_name, registry_url, username, password)` - pushes image, returns dict
162:   - `_docker_login_sdk(registry, username, password)` - SDK login
163:   - `_tag_image_sdk(source_image, target_image)` - tags image
164:   - `remove_image(image_name)` - returns bool, logs warning on failure
165: 
166: - **`cmd/cli/agentcube/services/k8s_provider.py`**
167:   - `KubernetesProvider` class with `__init__(namespace="default", verbose=False, kubeconfig=None)`
168:   - `_ensure_namespace()` - creates namespace if missing
169:   - `deploy_agent(agent_name, image_url, port, entrypoint=None, replicas=1, node_port=None, env_vars=None)`:
170:     - Creates Deployment and NodePort Service
171:     - Waits for rollout with `wait_for_deployment_ready`
172:     - Returns dict with deployment_name, service_name, namespace, replicas, container_port, node_port, service_url
173:   - `_create_deployment(name, image_url, port, entrypoint, replicas, env_vars)` - returns Deployment
174:   - `_create_service(name, port, node_port)` - returns Service
175:   - `wait_for_deployment_ready(name, timeout=120)` - raises TimeoutError if not ready
176:   - `get_agent_status(agent_name)` - returns status dict
177:   - `delete_agent(agent_name)` - deletes Deployment and Service, ignores 404
178:   - `_sanitize_name(name)` - converts to k8s-safe name
179: 
180: - **`cmd/cli/agentcube/services/agentcube_provider.py`**
181:   - `AgentCubeProvider` class with `__init__(namespace="default", verbose=False, kubeconfig=None)`
182:   - `_ensure_namespace()` - creates namespace if missing
183:   - `deploy_agent_runtime(agent_name, image_url, port, entrypoint=None, env_vars=None, workload_manager_url=None, router_url=None, readiness_probe_path=None, readiness_probe_port=None)`:
184:     - Creates AgentRuntime CRD

204: ## AR-024: Session Store Implementation
205: 
206: ### Purpose
207: Persist sandbox metadata keyed by session id, index sessions by expiry and last activity for garbage collection, support Redis or Valkey backends selected by configuration.
208: 
209: ### Files to Create
210: 
211: - **`pkg/store/store.go`**
212:   - Store interface with methods:
213:     - `Ping(ctx context.Context) error`
214:     - `GetSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) (*types.SandboxInfo, error)`
215:     - `StoreSandbox(ctx context.Context, sandboxStore *types.SandboxInfo) error`
216:     - `UpdateSandbox(ctx context.Context, sandboxStore *types.SandboxInfo) error`
217:     - `DeleteSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) error`
218:     - `ListExpiredSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int64) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error)`
219:     - `ListInactiveSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int64) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error)`
220:     - `UpdateSessionLastActivity(ctx context.Context, sessionID string, at time.Time) error`
221:     - `Close() error`
222:   - `ErrNotFound error = errors.New("store: not found")`
223:   - `Storage() Store` singleton function using sync.Once
224: 
225: - **`pkg/store/singleton.go`**
226:   - Constants: `redisStoreType = "redis"`, `valkeyStoreType = "valkey"`
227:   - Variables: `initStoreOnce sync.Once`, `provider Store`
228:   - `Storage()` calls `initStoreOnce.Do(initStore)`
229:   - `initStore()`:
230:     - Reads `STORE_TYPE` env var (case-insensitive, default redis)
231:     - Constructs Redis or Valkey store based on type
232:     - Calls `klog.Fatalf` on error
233: 
234: - **`pkg/store/store_redis.go`**
235:   - `redisStore` struct with:
236:     - `cli *redisv9.Client` (github.com/redis/go-redis/v9)
237:     - `sessionPrefix = "session:"`
238:     - `expiryIndexKey = "session:expiry"`
239:     - `lastActivityIndexKey = "session:last_activity"`
240:   - `NewRedisStore() error`:
241:     - Reads `REDIS_ADDR` (required)
242:     - Reads `REDIS_PASSWORD` (required unless `REDIS_PASSWORD_REQUIRED=false`)
243:     - Creates client with `makeRedisOptions`
244:   - `makeRedisOptions() *redisv9.Options` - returns Options with Addr and Password
245:   - `Ping(ctx)` - PING command, expects "PONG"
246:   - `GetSandboxBySessionID(ctx, sessionID)`:
247:     - GET session:{id}
248:     - Unmarshals to types.SandboxInfo
249:     - Returns ErrNotFound on nil (redis.Nil)
250:   - `StoreSandbox(ctx, sandboxStore)`:
251:     - Validates non-nil sandbox and non-zero ExpiresAt
252:     - Pipeline: SETNX session:{id}, ZADD session:expiry, ZADD session:last_activity with time.Now().Unix()
253:     - Fails if any command errors
254:   - `UpdateSandbox(ctx, sandboxStore)`:
255:     - SET key value XX (key must exist)
256:     - Returns error if key doesn't exist
257:   - `DeleteSandboxBySessionID(ctx, sessionID)`:
258:     - Pipeline: DEL session:{id}, ZREM session:expiry, ZREM session:last_activity
259:   - `ListExpiredSandboxes(ctx, before, limit)`:
260:     - ZRANGEBYSCORE session:expiry -inf {before.Unix} LIMIT 0 limit
261:     - Pipeline GETs for all session IDs
262:     - Skips entries where key missing
263:   - `ListInactiveSandboxes(ctx, before, limit)`:
264:     - ZRANGEBYSCORE session:last_activity -inf {before.Unix} LIMIT 0 limit
265:     - Pipeline GETs, skips missing keys
266:   - `UpdateSessionLastActivity(ctx, sessionID, at)`:
267:     - Validates sessionID non-empty
268:     - GET to verify exists
269:     - ZADD session:last_activity with at.Unix() or now.Unix() if zero
270:     - Returns ErrNotFound if missing
271:   - `Close()` - cli.Close()
272:   - `sessionKey(id)` - returns sessionPrefix + sessionID
273:   - `loadSandboxesBySessionIDs(ctx, sessionIDs)` - pipeline GET, skips nil results
274: 
275: - **`pkg/store/store_valkey.go`**
276:   - `valkeyStore` struct with:
277:     - `cli valkey.Client` (github.com/valkey-io/valkey-go)
278:     - Same string constants as Redis
279:   - `NewValkeyStore() error`:
280:     - Reads `VALKEY_ADDR` (comma-separated, required)
281:     - Reads `VALKEY_PASSWORD` (required unless `VALKEY_PASSWORD_REQUIRED=false`)
282:     - Reads `VALKEY_DISABLE_CACHE` (sets DisableCache if true)
283:     - Reads `VALKEY_FORCE_SINGLE` (sets ForceSingleClient if true)
284:     - Creates client with `makeValkeyOptions`
285:   - `makeValkeyOptions() *valkey.ClientOption` - returns ClientOption
286:   - `Ping(ctx)` - B().Ping() → expect "PONG"
287:   - `GetSandboxBySessionID(ctx, sessionID)`:
288:     - B().Get().Key(key)
289:     - IsValkeyNil → ErrNotFound
290:     - Unmarshals to types.SandboxInfo
291:   - `StoreSandbox(ctx, sandboxStore)`:
292:     - DoMulti: SETNX, ZADD expiry, ZADD last_activity
293:   - `UpdateSandbox(ctx, sandboxStore)`:
294:     - SET ... XX
295:     - Success requires ToString() == "OK"
296:   - `DeleteSandboxBySessionID(ctx, sessionID)`:
297:     - DoMulti: DEL, ZREM expiry, ZREM last_activity
298:   - `ListExpiredSandboxes(ctx, before, limit)`:
299:     - Zrangebyscore Min("-inf"), Max(fmt.Sprintf("%d", before.Unix())), Limit(0, limit)
300:     - Mget for all session keys
301:   - `ListInactiveSandboxes(ctx, before, limit)`:
302:     - Same on last_activity key
303:   - `UpdateSessionLastActivity(ctx, sessionID, at)`:
304:     - Exists key → int64 must be 1
305:     - Zadd with at.Unix() or now.Unix()
306:   - `Close()` - cli.Close()
307:   - ZSET scores: expiry = float64(sandboxRedis.ExpiresAt.Unix()), last_activity = float64(now.Unix() or at.Unix())
308:   - `loadSandboxesBySessionIDs(ctx, sessionIDs)` - builds all session:{id} keys, single Mget

559: ## AR-027: Code Execution (PicoD) Daemon
560: 
561: ### Purpose
562: HTTP daemon that runs commands inside a configurable workspace jail, manages workspace files, and exposes health endpoint with JWT-protected APIs.
563: 
564: ### Files to Create
565: 
566: - **`pkg/picod/config.go`**
567:   - Config struct with Port (int, default 8080), Workspace (string, default "")
568: 
569: - **`pkg/picod/server.go`**
570:   - Server struct with engine, config, authManager, startTime, workspaceDir
571:   - NewServer(config) - initializes gin.New(), sets mode, loads public key, resolves workspace
572:   - Run() - creates http.Server with ReadHeaderTimeout 10s, ListenAndServe
573:   - handleHealthCheck - GET /health, returns JSON status/service/version/uptime
574:   - Routes: /api with AuthMiddleware
575: 
576: - **`pkg/picod/execute.go`**
577:   - ExecuteRequest struct with Command, Timeout, WorkingDir, Env
578:   - ExecuteResponse struct with Stdout, Stderr, ExitCode, Duration, StartTime, EndTime
579:   - Constant TimeoutExitCode = 124
580:   - ExecuteHandler - POST /api/execute:
581:     - Binds JSON, validates non-empty Command
582:     - Parses Timeout (default 60s)
583:     - Resolves WorkingDir via sanitizePath
584:     - Creates exec.CommandContext with timeout
585:     - Captures stdout/stderr
586:     - Returns ExecuteResponse
587:     - On context.DeadlineExceeded → exit_code = 124
588:     - On invalid timeout → HTTP 400
589:     - On empty command → HTTP 400
590: 
591: - **`pkg/picod/files.go`**
592:   - FileInfo struct with Path, Size, Mode (string), Modified
593:   - UploadFileRequest struct with Path, Content (base64), Mode
594:   - FileEntry struct with Name, Size, Modified, Mode (string), IsDir
595:   - ListFilesResponse struct with Files []FileEntry
596:   - Constant maxFileMode = 0777
597:   - parseFileMode(modeStr) - parses octal, clamps to maxFileMode, returns 0644 on invalid
598:   - UploadFileHandler - POST /api/files:
599:     - Multipart: reads path, file, mode, creates dirs (0755), writes file with parseFileMode
600:     - JSON: decodes base64, creates dirs, writes file
601:     - Returns FileInfo
602:     - On missing → HTTP 400
603:     - On invalid base64 → HTTP 400
604:   - ListFilesHandler - GET /api/files?path=...:

891:       - base_url = urljoin(router_url, f"/v1/namespaces/{namespace}/agent-runtimes/{agent_name}/invocations/")
892:       - creates session
893:     - bootstrap_session_id(self) -> str:
894:       - GET base_url, reads header x-agentcube-session-id
895:       - raises ValueError if missing
896:     - invoke(self, session_id, payload, timeout=None) -> requests.Response:
897:       - POST base_url with json=payload, headers={SESSION_HEADER, "Content-Type"}
898:       - timeout=(connect_timeout, timeout or self.timeout)

900: 
901: - **`sdk-python/agentcube/code_interpreter.py`**

906:       - if session_id not provided: creates session via cp_client

909:     - _init_data_plane(self): creates CodeInterpreterDataPlaneClient
910:     - __enter__(self): returns self
911:     - __exit__(self, exc_type, exc_val, exc_tb): calls stop(), returns False
912:     - stop(self): closes dp_client, deletes session if created, closes cp_client
913:     - execute_command(self, command, timeout=None) -> str: delegates to dp_client, raises CommandExecutionError on non-zero
914:     - run_code(self, language, code, timeout=None) -> str: delegates to dp_client
915:     - write_file(self, content, remote_path): delegates to dp_client
916:     - upload_file(self, local_path, remote_path): delegates to dp_client
917:     - download_file(self, remote_path, local_path): delegates to dp_client
918:     - list_files(self, path="."): delegates to dp_client

920: - **`sdk-python/agentcube/agent_runtime.py`**
921:   - class AgentRuntimeClient:
922:     - __init__(self, agent_name, namespace="default", router_url=None, verbose=False, session_id=None, timeout=120, connect_timeout=5.0):
923:       - validates router_url
924:       - creates AgentRuntimeDataPlaneClient
925:       - if session_id not provided: bootstrap_session_id(), sets session_id
926:       - raises ValueError if bootstrap fails
927:     - __enter__(self): returns self
928:     - __exit__(self, exc_type, exc_val, exc_tb): calls close(), returns False
929:     - invoke(self, payload, timeout=None) -> Any:
930:       - validates session_id non-empty
931:       - calls dp_client.invoke(session_id, payload, timeout)
932:       - returns response.json()
933:     - close(self): closes dp_client

935: ## AR-030: Idle Cleanup Controller
936:

947:     - if NotFound → return ctrl.Result{}, nil

# AgentCube Implementation Plan: AR-023 through AR-033

## Overview

This document details the complete implementation of Architectural Requirements AR-023 through AR-033 for the AgentCube Kubernetes-native sandbox orchestration platform. Each AR results in complete, production-ready code with no placeholders or stubs.

## AR-023: CLI Toolkit Implementation

### Purpose
Command-line tool (`kubectl-agentcube`) for packaging, building, publishing, invoking, and checking status of AI agents against AgentCube or standard Kubernetes.

### Files to Create

#### Core Configuration
- **`cmd/cli/pyproject.toml`**
  - Package `agentcube`
  - Dependencies: typer[all]>=0.9.0, pydantic>=2.0.0, pyyaml>=6.0, httpx>=0.24.0, docker>=6.0.0, rich>=13.0.0, packaging>=23.0, importlib-resources>=6.0.0, semver>=3.0.0
  - Optional dependencies: k8s (kubernetes>=28.0.0), dev (pytest>=7.4.0, pytest-asyncio>=0.21.0, pytest-cov>=4.1.0, ruff>=0.1.0, mypy>=1.5.0, pre-commit>=3.3.0, kubernetes>=28.0.0), test (pytest>=7.4.0, pytest-asyncio>=0.21.0, pytest-cov>=4.1.0, pytest-mock>=3.11.0, httpx-mock>=0.10.0)
  - Python >=3.10
  - Console script: `kubectl-agentcube = "agentcube.cli.main:app"`

1054: ## AR-032: Session Routing Service
1055: 
1056: ### Purpose
1057: Route HTTP invocation traffic to sandboxes by session: resolve or create sessions via workload manager, track activity in store, reverse-proxy to pod endpoints, sign outbound requests with JWT.
1058: 
1059: ### Files to Create
1060: 
1061: - **`pkg/router/config.go`**
1062:   - const LastActivityAnnotationKey = "agentcube.volcano.sh/last-activity"
1063:   - Config struct with Port, Debug, EnableTLS, TLSCert, TLSKey, MaxConcurrentRequests
1064: 
1065: - **`pkg/router/server.go`**
1066:   - Server struct with config, engine, httpServer, sessionManager, storeClient, httpTransport, jwtManager
1067:   - NewServer(config) - initializes gin, sets routes, creates JWTManager, calls TryStoreOrLoadJWTKeySecret
1068:   - Start() - starts HTTP server with h2c, http2.Server, ReadTimeout 30s, IdleTimeout 90s, 10s shutdown
1069:   - handleHealthLive - GET /health/live, returns {"status":"alive"}
1070:   - handleHealthReady - GET /health/ready, returns {"status":"ready"} or 503
1071:   - handleAgentInvoke - GET/POST /v1/namespaces/:namespace/agent-runtimes/:name/invocations/*path
1072:   - handleCodeInterpreterInvoke - GET/POST /v1/namespaces/:namespace/code-interpreters/:name/invocations/*path
1073:   - Routes: /v1 with gin.Logger, gin.Recovery, concurrencyLimitMiddleware
1074:   - concurrencyLimitMiddleware - semaphore with MaxConcurrentRequests capacity (default 1000), returns 429 when full
1075: 
1076: - **`pkg/router/session_manager.go`**
1077:   - SessionManager interface: GetSandboxBySession(ctx, sessionID, namespace, name, kind) -> (*types.SandboxInfo, error)
1078:   - manager struct with storeClient, workloadMgrAddr, httpClient
1079:   - NewSessionManager(storeClient) (SessionManager, error):
1080:     - reads WORKLOAD_MANAGER_URL (required), returns error if unset
1081:     - creates httpClient with Timeout: 2m, MaxIdleConnsPerHost: 100, http2 support
1082:     - loads auth token from SA token file
1083:   - GetSandboxBySession(ctx, sessionID, namespace, name, kind):
1084:     - if sessionID empty: POST to workload manager, returns CreateSandboxResponse
1085:     - else: storeClient.GetSandboxBySessionID, returns ErrNotFound on miss
1086:     - on workload manager 404: returns NewSandboxTemplateNotFoundError
1087:     - validates sessionId non-empty
1088: 
1089: - **`pkg/router/jwt.go`**
1090:   - const rsaKeySize = 2048, jwtExpiration = 5*time.Minute
1091:   - const IdentitySecretName = "picod-router-identity", PrivateKeyDataKey = "private.pem", PublicKeyDataKey = "public.pem"
1092:   - var IdentityNamespace = "default" (init from AGENTCUBE_NAMESPACE)
1093:   - JWTManager struct with privateKey, publicKey, clientset
1094:   - NewJWTManager() - rsa.GenerateKey(rand.Reader, rsaKeySize)
1095:   - GenerateToken(claims) - signs JWT with RS256, 5-minute expiration
1096:   - TryStoreOrLoadJWTKeySecret(ctx):
1097:     - if clientset nil: tries in-cluster config, returns nil on failure
1098:     - else: creates secret IdentitySecretName in IdentityNamespace
1099:     - on AlreadyExists: gets secret, loads private key
1100:   - loadPrivateKeyPEM() - loads private key from secret data
1101: 
1102: - **`pkg/router/proxy.go`**
1103:   - forwardToSandbox(sandboxInfo, kind, path, c):
1104:     - determines upstream URL from EntryPoints (match path prefix, use first)
1105:     - creates httputil.NewSingleHostReverseProxy with targetURL
1106:     - custom Director: sets path, host, forwarding headers, Authorization with JWT if kind in [Sandbox, SandboxClaim]
1107:     - custom ModifyResponse: sets x-agentcube-session-id
1108:     - ErrorHandler: maps errors (connection refused → 502, timeout → 504)
1109:     - on JWT signing error: 500 JSON {"code":"JWT_SIGNING_FAILED","error":"failed to sign request"}
1110:     - on no entry points: 404 JSON {"error":"no entry point found for sandbox"}
1111: 
1112: - **`pkg/router/handlers.go`**
1113:   - handleGetSandboxError(err, c):
1114:     - if apierrors.APIStatus: uses Status().Code, message from status or err.Error()
1115:     - else: 500 {"error":"internal server error"}
1116:   - handleInvoke(kind, namespace, name, path, c):
1117:     - reads session id from x-agentcube-session-id header
1118:     - sessionManager.GetSandboxBySession with kind
1119:     - calls storeClient.UpdateSessionLastActivity after resolve and after forwardToSandbox (logs warnings on failure)
1120:     - forwardToSandbox with sandboxInfo, kind, path
1121: 
1122: - **`cmd/router/main.go`**
1123:   - Flags: -port (8080), -enable-tls (false), -tls-cert (""), -tls-key (""), -debug (false), -max-concurrent-requests (1000)
1124:   - klog.InitFlags(nil)
1125:   - Constructs router.Config, store.Storage(), router.NewServer
1126:   - server.Start()
1127: 
1128: ## AR-033: CRD Definitions and Types
1129: 
1130: ### Purpose
1131: Complete CRD definitions for AgentRuntime and CodeInterpreter with generated deepcopy and registration code.
1132: 
1133: ### Files to Create
1134: 
1135: - **`pkg/apis/runtime/v1alpha1/doc.go`**
1136:   - +k8s:deepcopy-gen=package
1137:   - +groupName=runtime.agentcube.volcano.sh
1138:   - Package v1alpha1 contains API Schema definitions
1139: 
1140: - **`pkg/apis/runtime/v1alpha1/zz_generated.deepcopy.go`**
1141:   - Generated by controller-gen
1142:   - DeepCopy methods for all types
1143: 
1144: - **`pkg/apis/runtime/v1alpha1/zz_generated.register.go`**
1145:   - Generated by controller-gen
1146:   - Scheme registration
1147: 
1148: - **`pkg/common/types/zz_generated.deepcopy.go`**
1149:   - Generated deepcopy methods for types
1150: 
1151: ## Implementation Notes
1152: 
1153: - All Go code must use proper error handling with context
1154: - All HTTP handlers must return appropriate status codes with JSON error messages
1155: - All Kubernetes operations must use proper client-go patterns with informers and listers
1156: - All Python code must follow PEP 8 and include type hints
1157: - All Docker images must run as non-root users except PicoD which runs as root
1158: - All Helm templates must use proper Go template syntax with safe defaults
1159: - All CI/CD workflows must use proper GitHub Actions best practices
1160: - All tests must be written and pass before considering implementation complete
1161: 
1162: ## Summary
1163: 
1164: This plan implements all 11 Architectural Requirements (AR-023 through AR-033) with complete, production-ready code covering:
1165: - Full Python CLI toolkit for agent lifecycle management
1166: - Redis/Valkey session store with atomic operations
1167: - Dify plugin integration and PCAP analyzer example
1168: - Complete deployment infrastructure (Helm, Docker, Makefile)
1169: - PicoD HTTP daemon for jailed code execution
1170: - Sandbox orchestration control plane (CRDs, workload manager)
1171: - Python SDK with control and data plane clients
1172: - Idle cleanup controller for sandbox garbage collection
1173: - Full CI/CD pipeline with tests and image publishing
1174: - Session routing service with JWT authentication
1175: - Complete CRD definitions and generated code
1176: 
1177: Each file will contain full implementation with no placeholders or stubs, ensuring the system is production-ready and fully functional.

(End of file - total 1177 lines)

metadata.preview:
- reads last-activity-time annotation from workloadmanager.LastActivityAnnotationKey
    - if exists and non-empty:
      - parses with time.RFC3339
      - on parse error → return ctrl.Result{RequeueAfter: 30s}, err
      - expirationTime = lastActivity.Add(SessionExpirationTimeout)
      - if time.Now().After(expirationTime):
        - deletes Sandbox
        - on NotFound → return ctrl.Result{}, nil
        - on other error → return ctrl.Result{}, err
      - else:
        - return ctrl.Result{RequeueAfter: time.Until(expirationTime)}, nil
    - else:
      - return ctrl.Result{}, nil
  - SetupWithManager(mgr) - registers controller for Sandbox

- **`cmd/agentd/main.go`**
  - var schemeBuilder = runtime.NewScheme()
  - func init():
    - utilruntime.Must(scheme.AddToScheme(schemeBuilder))
    - utilruntime.Must(sandboxv1alpha1.AddToScheme(schemeBuilder))

<content>1: package agentd
2: 
3: import (
4: 	"context"
5: 	"fmt"
6: 	"time"
7: 
8: 	corev1 "k8s.io/api/core/v1"
9: 	"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/api/errors"
10: 	metav1 "k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1"
11: 	"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime"
12: 	"sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/client"
13: 	"sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/log"
14: 	"sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/reconcile"
15: 
16: 	sandboxv1alpha1 "agents.x-k8s.io/api/v1alpha1"
17: )
18: 
19: const (
20: 	SessionExpirationTimeout  = 15 * time.Minute
21: 	LastActivityAnnotationKey = "agentcube.volcano.sh/last-activity"
22: )
23: 
24: type Reconciler struct {
25: 	client.Client
26: 	Scheme *runtime.Scheme
27: }
28: 
29: func (r *Reconciler) Reconcile(ctx context.Context, req reconcile.Request) (reconcile.Result, error) {
30: 	log := log.FromContext(ctx)
31: 
32: 	sandbox := &sandboxv1alpha1.Sandbox{}
33: 	if err := r.Get(ctx, req.NamespacedName, sandbox); err != nil {
34: 		if errors.IsNotFound(err) {
35: 			return reconcile.Result{}, nil
36: 		}
37: 		return reconcile.Result{}, err
38: 	}
39: 
40: 	lastActivityStr, ok := sandbox.Annotations[LastActivityAnnotationKey]
41: 	if !ok || lastActivityStr == "" {
42: 		return reconcile.Result{}, nil
43: 	}
44: 
45: 	lastActivity, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339, lastActivityStr)
46: 	if err != nil {
47: 		log.Error(err, "Failed to parse last activity time", "annotation", lastActivityStr)
48: 		return reconcile.Result{RequeueAfter: 30 * time.Second}, err
49: 	}
50: 
51: 	expiration := lastActivity.Add(SessionExpirationTimeout)
52: 	if time.Now().After(expiration) {
53: 		log.Info("Deleting sandbox due to inactivity", "sandbox", req.NamespacedName)
54: 		if err := r.Delete(ctx, sandbox); err != nil {
55: 			return reconcile.Result{}, err
56: 		}
57: 		return reconcile.Result{}, nil
58: 	}
59: 
60: 	return reconcile.Result{RequeueAfter: time.Until(expiration)}, nil
61: }
62: 
63: func (r *Reconciler) SetupWithManager(mgr manager.Manager) error {
64: 	return ctrl.NewControllerManagedBy(mgr).
65: 		For(&sandboxv1alpha1.Sandbox{}).
66: 		Complete(r)
67: }

(End of file - total 67 lines)
</content>

<content>1: package picod
2: 
3: import (
4: 	"net/http"
5: 	"os"
6: 	"path/filepath"
7: 	"sync"
8: 	"time"
9: 
10: 	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
11: 	"k8s.io/klog/v2"
12: )
13: 
14: const (
15: 	TimeoutExitCode          = 124
16: 	MaxBodySize              = 32 << 20
17: 	PublicKeyEnvVar          = "PICOD_AUTH_PUBLIC_KEY"
18: 	maxFileMode              = 0777
19: 	DefaultPort              = "8080"
20: 	DefaultReadHeaderTimeout = 10 * time.Second
21: )
22: 
23: type Server struct {
24: 	engine       *gin.Engine
25: 	config       *Config
26: 	authManager  *AuthManager
27: 	startTime    time.Time
28: 	workspaceDir string
29: 	mu           sync.RWMutex
30: }
31: 
32: func NewServer(config *Config) (*Server, error) {
33: 	if err := os.Setenv(gin.EnvGinMode, gin.ReleaseMode); err != nil {
34: 		return nil, err
35: 	}
36: 
37: 	gin.SetMode(gin.ReleaseMode)
38: 	engine := gin.New()
39: 	engine.Use(gin.Logger())
40: 	engine.Use(gin.Recovery())
41: 
42: 	authManager := &AuthManager{}
43: 	if err := authManager.LoadPublicKeyFromEnv(); err != nil {
44: 		return nil, err
45: 	}
46: 
47: 	workspaceDir := config.Workspace
48: 	if workspaceDir == "" {
49: 		wd, err := os.Getwd()
50: 		if err != nil {
51: 			return nil, err
52: 		}
53: 		workspaceDir = wd
54: 	}
55: 
56: 	server := &Server{
57: 		engine:       engine,
58: 		config:       config,
59: 		authManager:  authManager,
60: 		startTime:    time.Now(),
61: 		workspaceDir: workspaceDir,
62: 	}
63: 
64: 	server.registerRoutes()
65: 
66: 	return server, nil
67: }
68: 
69: func (s *Server) Run() error {
70: 	port := s.config.Port
71: 	if port == "" {
72: 		port = DefaultPort
73: 	}
74: 
75: 	srv := &http.Server{
76: 		Addr:              ":" + port,
77: 		Handler:           s.engine,
78: 		ReadHeaderTimeout: DefaultReadHeaderTimeout,
79: 	}
80: 
81: 	klog.Infof("Starting PicoD server on port %s", port)
82: 	klog.Infof("Workspace directory: %s", s.workspaceDir)
83: 
84: 	return srv.ListenAndServe()
85: }
86: 
87: func (s *Server) setWorkspace(path string) error {
88: 	absPath, err := s.resolvePath(path)
89: 	if err != nil {
90: 		return err
91: 	}
92: 
93: 	if _, err := os.Stat(absPath); err != nil {
94: 		return err
95: 	}
96: 
97: 	s.mu.Lock()
98: 	s.workspaceDir = absPath
99: 	s.mu.Unlock()
100: 
101: 	return nil
102: }
103: 
104: func (s *Server) resolvePath(path string) (string, error) {
105: 	if path == "" {
106: 		return os.Getwd()
107: 	}
108: 	return filepath.Abs(path)
109: }
110: 
111: func (s *Server) HealthCheckHandler(c *gin.Context) {
112: 	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{
113: 		"status":  "ok",
114: 		"service": "PicoD",
115: 		"version": "0.0.1",
116: 		"uptime":  time.Since(s.startTime).String(),
117: 	})
118: }
119: 
120: func (s *Server) registerRoutes() {
121: 	publicGroup := s.engine.Group("/")
122: 	publicGroup.GET("/health", s.HealthCheckHandler)
123: 
124: 	apiGroup := s.engine.Group("/api")
125: 	apiGroup.Use(s.authManager.AuthMiddleware())
126: 
127: 	apiGroup.POST("/execute", s.ExecuteHandler)
128: 	apiGroup.POST("/files", s.UploadFileHandler)
129: 	apiGroup.GET("/files", s.ListFilesHandler)
130: 	apiGroup.GET("/files/*path", s.DownloadFileHandler)
131: }

<content>1: package picod
2: 
3: import (
4: 	"bytes"
5: 	"context"
6: 	"encoding/json"
7: 	"fmt"
8: 	"io"
9: 	"net/http"
10: 	"os"
11: 	"os/exec"
12: 	"path/filepath"
13: 	"strconv"
14: 	"strings"
15: 	"time"
16: 
17: 	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
18: 	"k8s.io/klog/v2"
19: )
20: 
21: type ExecuteRequest struct {
22: 	Command    []string          `json:"command"`
23: 	Timeout    string            `json:"timeout"`
24: 	WorkingDir string            `json:"working_dir"`
25: 	Env        map[string]string `json:"env"`
26: }
27: 
28: type ExecuteResponse struct {
29: 	Stdout    string  `json:"stdout"`
30: 	Stderr    string  `json:"stderr"`
31: 	ExitCode  int     `json:"exit_code"`
32: 	Duration  float64 `json:"duration"`
33: 	StartTime string  `json:"start_time"`
34: 	EndTime   string  `json:"end_time"`
35: }
36: 
37: func (s *Server) ExecuteHandler(c *gin.Context) {
38: 	var req ExecuteRequest
39: 	if err := c.ShouldBindJSON(&req); err != nil {
40: 		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{
41: 			"error": err.Error(),
42: 			"code":  400,
43: 		})
44: 		return
45: 	}
46: 
47: 	if len(req.Command) == 0 {
48: 		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{
49: 			"error": "command cannot be empty",
50: 			"code":  400,
51: 		})
52: 		return
53: 	}
54: 
55: 	timeout := 60 * time.Second
56: 	if req.Timeout != "" {
57: 		parsedTimeout, err := time.ParseDuration(req.Timeout)
58: 		if err != nil {
59: 			c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{
60: 				"error": fmt.Sprintf("invalid timeout format: %v", err),
61: 				"code":  400,
62: 			})
63: 			return
64: 		}
65: 		timeout = parsedTimeout
66: 	}
67: 
68: 	ctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), timeout)
69: 	defer cancel()
70: 
71: 	cmd := exec.CommandContext(ctx, req.Command[0], req.Command[1:]...)
72: 
73: 	if req.WorkingDir != "" {
74: 		s.mu.RLock()
75: 		absWorkspace := s.workspaceDir
76: 		s.mu.RUnlock()
77: 
78: 		sanitizedDir, err := sanitizePath(req.WorkingDir, absWorkspace)
79: 		if err != nil {
80: 			c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{
81: 				"error": fmt.Sprintf("Invalid working directory: %v", err),
82: 				"code":  400,
83: 			})
84: 			return
85: 		}
86: 		cmd.Dir = sanitizedDir
87: 	}
88: 
89: 	cmd.Env = os.Environ()
90: 	for k, v := range req.Env {
91: 		cmd.Env = append(cmd.Env, fmt.Sprintf("%s=%s", k, v))
92: 	}
93: 
94: 	var stdout, stderr bytes.Buffer
95: 	cmd.Stdout = &stdout
96: 	cmd.Stderr = &stderr
97: 
98: 	startTime := time.Now()
99: 	err := cmd.Run()
100: 	endTime := time.Now()
101: 
102: 	exitCode := 0
103: 	if err != nil {
104: 		if ctx.Err() == context.DeadlineExceeded {
105: 			exitCode = TimeoutExitCode
106: 			stderr.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf("\nCommand timed out after %d seconds\n", int(timeout.Seconds())))
107: 		} else if exitErr, ok := err.(*exec.ExitError); ok {
108: 			exitCode = exitErr.ExitCode()
109: 		} else {
110: 			exitCode = 1
111: 		}
112: 	}
113: 
114: 	response := ExecuteResponse{
115: 		Stdout:    stdout.String(),
116: 		Stderr:    stderr.String(),
117: 		ExitCode:  exitCode,
118: 		Duration:  endTime.Sub(startTime).Seconds(),
119: 		StartTime: startTime.Format(time.RFC3339),
120: 		EndTime:   endTime.Format(time.RFC3339),
121: 	}
122: 
123: 	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, response)
124: }

<content>1: package router
2: 
3: import (
4: 	"context"
5: 	"encoding/json"
6: 	"fmt"
7: 	"net/http"
8: 	"os"
9: 	"time"
10: 
11: 	"github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/common/types"
12: 	"github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/store"
13: )
14: 
15: type SessionManager interface {
16: 	GetSandboxBySession(ctx context.Context, sessionID, namespace, name, kind string) (*types.SandboxInfo, error)
17: }
18: 
19: type manager struct {
20: 	storeClient     store.Store
21: 	workloadMgrAddr string
22: 	httpClient      *http.Client
23: 	authToken       string
24: }
25: 
26: func NewSessionManager(storeClient store.Store) SessionManager {
27: 	mgr := &manager{
28: 		storeClient: storeClient,
29: 		httpClient: &http.Client{
30: 			Timeout: 2 * time.Minute,
31: 			Transport: &http.Transport{
32: 				MaxIdleConns:        100,
33: 				MaxIdleConnsPerHost: 10,
34: 				IdleConnTimeout:     90 * time.Second,
35: 			},
36: 		},
37: 	}
38: 	mgr.loadWorkloadManagerAuthToken()
39: 	mgr.loadWorkloadManagerAddr()
40: 	return mgr
41: }
42: 
43: func (m *manager) loadWorkloadManagerAddr() {
44: 	m.workloadMgrAddr = "http://workload-manager:8080"
45: 	if addr := os.Getenv("WORKLOAD_MANAGER_URL"); addr != "" {
46: 		m.workloadMgrAddr = addr
47: 	}
48: }
49: 
50: func (m *manager) loadWorkloadManagerAuthToken() {
51: 	m.authToken = ""
52: 	if token, err := os.ReadFile("/var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/token"); err == nil {
53: 		m.authToken = string(token)
54: 	}
55: }
56: 
57: func (m *manager) GetSandboxBySession(ctx context.Context, sessionID, namespace, name, kind string) (*types.SandboxInfo, error) {
58: 	if sessionID == "" {
59: 		return m.createSandbox(ctx, namespace, name, kind)
60: 	}
61: 
62: 	sandbox, err := m.storeClient.GetSandboxBySessionID(ctx, sessionID)
63: 	if err != nil {
64: 		if err == store.ErrNotFound {
65: 			return nil, fmt.Errorf("session not found: %s", sessionID)
66: 		}
67: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to load session: %w", err)
68: 	}
69: 
70: 	return sandbox, nil
71: }
72: 
73: func (m *manager) createSandbox(ctx context.Context, namespace, name, kind string) (*types.SandboxInfo, error) {
74: 	req := types.CreateSandboxRequest{
75: 		Kind:      kind,
76: 		Name:      name,
77: 		Namespace: namespace,
78: 	}
79: 
80: 	if err := req.Validate(); err != nil {
81: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("invalid request: %w", err)
82: 	}
83: 
84: 	var resp types.CreateSandboxResponse
85: 	var endpoint string
86: 
87: 	if kind == "AgentRuntime" {
88: 		endpoint = fmt.Sprintf("%s/v1/agent-runtime", m.workloadMgrAddr)
89: 	} else if kind == "CodeInterpreter" {
90: 		endpoint = fmt.Sprintf("%s/v1/code-interpreter", m.workloadMgrAddr)
91: 	} else {
92: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("unsupported kind: %s", kind)
93: 	}
94: 
95: 	httpReq, err := http.NewRequestWithContext(ctx, "POST", endpoint, nil)
96: 	if err != nil {
97: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to create request: %w", err)
98: 	}
99: 
100: 	if m.authToken != "" {
101: 		httpReq.Header.Set("Authorization", "Bearer "+m.authToken)
102: 	}
103: 
104: 	httpResp, err := m.httpClient.Do(httpReq)
105: 	if err != nil {
106: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to create sandbox: %w", err)
107: 	}
108: 	defer httpResp.Body.Close()
109: 
110: 	if httpResp.StatusCode != http.StatusOK {
111: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to create sandbox: status %d", httpResp.StatusCode)
112: 	}
113: 
114: 	if err := json.NewDecoder(httpResp.Body).Decode(&resp); err != nil {
115: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to decode response: %w", err)
116: 	}
117: 
118: 	sandbox := &types.SandboxInfo{
119: 		SessionID:   resp.SessionID,
120: 		SandboxID:   resp.SandboxID,
121: 		SandboxName: resp.SandboxName,
122: 		EntryPoints: resp.EntryPoints,
123: 		Namespace:   namespace,
124: 		Name:        name,
125: 		Kind:        kind,
126: 		CreatedAt:   time.Now(),
127: 		Status:      "running",
128: 	}
129: 
130: 	return sandbox, nil
131: }

<content>1: package agentd
2: 
3: import (
4: 	"context"

9: 	"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/api/errors"
10: 	metav1 "k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1"
11: 	"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime"
12: 	"sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/client"
13: 	"sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/log"
14: 	"sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/reconcile"
15: 
16: 	sandboxv1alpha1 "agents.x-k8s.io/api/v1alpha1"
17: )
18: 
19: const (
20: 	SessionExpirationTimeout  = 15 * time.Minute
21: 	LastActivityAnnotationKey = "agentcube.volcano.sh/last-activity"
22: )
23: 
24: type Reconciler struct {
25: 	client.Client
26: 	Scheme *runtime.Scheme
27: }
28: 
29: func (r *Reconciler) Reconcile(ctx context.Context, req reconcile.Request) (reconcile.Result, error) {
30: 	log := log.FromContext(ctx)
31: 
32: 	sandbox := &sandboxv1alpha1.Sandbox{}
33: 	if err := r.Get(ctx, req.NamespacedName, sandbox); err != nil {
34: 		if errors.IsNotFound(err) {
35: 			return reconcile.Result{}, nil
36: 		}
37: 		return reconcile.Result{}, err
38: 	}
39: 
40: 	lastActivityStr, ok := sandbox.Annotations[LastActivityAnnotationKey]
41: 	if !ok || lastActivityStr == "" {
42: 		return reconcile.Result{}, nil
43: 	}
44: 
45: 	lastActivity, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339, lastActivityStr)
46: 	if err != nil {
47: 		log.Error(err, "Failed to parse last activity time", "annotation", lastActivityStr)
48: 		return reconcile.Result{RequeueAfter: 30 * time.Second}, err
49: 	}
50: 
51: 	expiration := lastActivity.Add(SessionExpirationTimeout)
52: 	if time.Now().After(expiration) {
53: 		log.Info("Deleting sandbox due to inactivity", "sandbox", req.NamespacedName)
54: 		if err := r.Delete(ctx, sandbox); err != nil {
55: 			return reconcile.Result{}, err
56: 		}
57: 		return reconcile.Result{}, nil
58: 	}
59: 
60: 	return reconcile.Result{RequeueAfter: time.Until(expiration)}, nil
61: }
62: 
63: func (r *Reconciler) SetupWithManager(mgr sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/manager.Manager) error {
64: 	return builder.NewControllerManagedBy(mgr).
65: 		For(&sandboxv1alpha1.Sandbox{}).
66: 		Complete(r)
67: }

import (
	"context"

110: 	defer cancel()
111: 
112: 	if err := s.httpServer.Shutdown(ctx); err != nil {
113: 		klog.Errorf("Server shutdown error: %v", err)
114: 		return err
115: 	}
116: 
117: 	klog.Info("Server stopped")
118: 	return nil
119: }
120: 
121: func (s *Server) createHandler() http.Handler {
122: 	if s.config.EnableTLS {
123: 		return s.engine
124: 	}
125: 	return h2c.NewHandler(s.engine, &http2.Server{})
126: }
127: 
128: func (s *Server) registerRoutes() {
129: 	s.engine.GET("/health/live", s.handleHealthLive)
130: 	s.engine.GET("/health/ready", s.handleHealthReady)
131: 
132: 	v1Group := s.engine.Group("/v1")
133: 	v1Group.Use(concurrencyLimitMiddleware(s.config.MaxConcurrentRequests))
134: 
135: 	agentGroup := v1Group.Group("/namespaces/:namespace/agent-runtimes/:name")
136: 	agentGroup.Any("/invocations/*path", s.handleAgentInvoke)
137: 
138: 	codeGroup := v1Group.Group("/namespaces/:namespace/code-interpreters/:name")
139: 	codeGroup.Any("/invocations/*path", s.handleCodeInterpreterInvoke)
140: }
141: 
142: func (s *Server) handleHealthLive(c *gin.Context) {
143: 	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"status": "alive"})
144: }
145: 
146: func (s *Server) handleHealthReady(c *gin.Context) {
147: 	if err := s.storeClient.Ping(); err != nil {
148: 		c.JSON(http.StatusServiceUnavailable, gin.H{
149: 			"status": "not ready",
150: 			"error":  err.Error(),
151: 		})
152: 		return
153: 	}
154: 	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"status": "ready"})
155: }

(End of file - total 155 lines)
</content>

49: 	}
50:

52:

57: 		Name:             req.Name,
58: 		Kind:             req.Kind,
59: 		CreatedAt:        time.Now(),
60: 		ExpiresAt:        timePtr(time.Now().Add(8 * time.Hour)),
61: 		Status:           "running",

67: 			},

69: 	}
70:

72: 		return nil, err

76: 		SessionID:   sessionID,
77: 		SandboxID:   sandbox.SandboxID,
78: 		SandboxName: req.Name,
79: 		EntryPoints: sandbox.EntryPoints,
80: 	}, nil
81: }
82: 
83: func (c *SandboxController) DeleteSandbox(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) error {
84: 	if err := c.store.DeleteSandboxBySessionID(ctx, sessionID); err != nil {
85: 		return err
86: 	}
87: 	return nil
88: }
89:

name: Agentcube CI Workflow

on:
  pull_request:
    branches: [main, release-*]
  push:
    branches: [main, release-*]

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Docker Buildx
        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3

      - name: Build images
        run: make docker-build

input.content:
name: Agentcube E2E Tests

on:
  pull_request:
    branches: [main, release-*]
  push:
    branches: [main, release-*]

jobs:
  e2e-test:
    name: E2E Tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Go
        uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version: '1.23'

      - name: Install Kind
        uses: helm/kind-action@v1.9.0
        with:
          version: v0.30.0
          install_only: true

      - name: Run E2E tests
        run: make e2e

      - name: Upload E2E logs
        if: failure()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: e2e-logs
          path: test/e2e/logs/

      - name: Cleanup
        if: always()
        run: make e2e-clean

on:
  pull_request:
    branches: [main, release-*]

jobs:
  golangci:
    name: golangci-lint
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Run golangci-lint

        with:
          version: latest
          args: --timeout=5m

name: Build and Push Release Images

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
    tags:
      - v*.*.*
      - v*.*.*-*

jobs:
  build-and-push:
    name: Build and Push
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Go
        uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version: '1.24.4'

      - name: Set up Docker Buildx
        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3

      - name: Log in to GitHub Container Registry
        uses: docker/login-action@v3
        with:
          registry: ghcr.io
          username: ${{ github.actor }}
          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Set tag
        run: |
          if [[ $GITHUB_REF == refs/tags/* ]]; then
            TAG=${GITHUB_REF#refs/tags/}
          else
            TAG=latest
          fi
          echo "TAG=$TAG" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          echo "IMAGE_REGISTRY=ghcr.io/volcano-sh" >> $GITHUB_ENV

      - name: Build and push images
        run: |
          make docker-buildx-push
          make docker-buildx-push-router
          make docker-buildx-push-picod

input.content:
.PHONY: all help gen-crd generate gen-client gen-all gen-check build build-all run clean deps test fmt vet lint gen-copyright install docker-build docker-buildx docker-push kind-load docker-build-router docker-buildx-router docker-push-router kind-load-router docker-build-picod docker-buildx-picod docker-push-picod kind-load-picod e2e e2e-clean build-python-sdk

HUB ?= ghcr.io/volcano-sh
TAG ?= latest
PROJECT_DIR := $(shell pwd)
GOBIN := $(PROJECT_DIR)/bin
CONTROLLER_GEN := $(shell which controller-gen || echo $(GOBIN)/controller-gen)
GOLANGCI_LINT := $(shell which golangci-lint || echo $(GOBIN)/golangci-lint)

WORKLOAD_MANAGER_IMAGE := $(HUB)/workloadmanager:$(TAG)
ROUTER_IMAGE := $(HUB)/agentcube-router:$(TAG)
PICOD_IMAGE := $(HUB)/picod:$(TAG)
IMAGE_REGISTRY := $(HUB)

E2E_CLUSTER_NAME := agentcube-e2e

all: build

help:
	@echo "Usage: make [target]"
	@echo ""
	@echo "Available targets:"
	@echo "  all              - Build all binaries"
	@echo "  help             - Show this help message"
	@echo "  gen-crd          - Generate CRDs"
	@echo "  generate         - Run all code generation"
	@echo "  gen-client       - Generate client code"
	@echo "  gen-all          - Generate all code"
	@echo "  gen-check        - Check if generated code is up to date"
	@echo "  build            - Build all binaries"
	@echo "  build-all        - Build all images"
	@echo "  run              - Run workload-manager locally"
	@echo "  clean            - Clean build artifacts"
	@echo "  deps             - Download dependencies"
	@echo "  test             - Run tests"
	@echo "  fmt              - Format code"
	@echo "  vet              - Run go vet"
	@echo "  lint             - Run linter"
	@echo "  gen-copyright    - Generate copyright headers"
	@echo "  install          - Install binaries"
	@echo "  docker-build     - Build Docker images"
	@echo "  docker-buildx    - Build Docker images with buildx"
	@echo "  docker-push      - Push Docker images"
	@echo "  kind-load        - Load images to Kind cluster"
	@echo "  e2e              - Run E2E tests"
	@echo "  e2e-clean        - Clean E2E test cluster"
	@echo "  build-python-sdk - Build Python SDK"

gen-crd: $(CONTROLLER_GEN)
	$(CONTROLLER_GEN) crd paths=./pkg/apis/runtime/v1alpha1

generate: gen-crd

gen-client:
	./hack/update-codegen.sh

gen-all: generate gen-client

gen-check:
	./hack/update-codegen.sh
	@if git diff --exit-code pkg/apis/...; then \
		echo "Generated code is up to date"; \
	else \
		echo "Generated code is not up to date. Run 'make gen-all'"; \
		exit 1; \
	fi

build:
	go build -o bin/workloadmanager ./cmd/workload-manager
	go build -o bin/router ./cmd/router
	go build -o bin/picod ./cmd/picod
	go build -o bin/agentd ./cmd/agentd

build-all: build docker-build

run:
	go run ./cmd/workload-manager/main.go

clean:
	rm -rf bin/
	go clean

deps:
	go mod download
	go mod tidy

test:
	go test -v ./...

fmt:
	go fmt ./...

vet:
	go vet ./...

lint: $(GOLANGCI_LINT)
	$(GOLANGCI_LINT) run ./...

gen-copyright:
	./hack/update-copyright.sh

install:
	go install ./cmd/workload-manager
	go install ./cmd/router
	go install ./cmd/picod
	go install ./cmd/agentd

docker-build:
	docker build -f docker/Dockerfile -t $(WORKLOAD_MANAGER_IMAGE) .
	docker build -f docker/Dockerfile.router -t $(ROUTER_IMAGE) .
	docker build -f docker/Dockerfile.picod -t $(PICOD_IMAGE) .

docker-buildx:
	docker buildx build -f docker/Dockerfile --platform linux/amd64,linux/arm64 -t $(WORKLOAD_MANAGER_IMAGE) --load .
	docker buildx build -f docker/Dockerfile.router --platform linux/amd64,linux/arm64 -t $(ROUTER_IMAGE) --load .
	docker buildx build -f docker/Dockerfile.picod --platform linux/amd64,linux/arm64 -t $(PICOD_IMAGE) --load .

docker-push:
	docker push $(WORKLOAD_MANAGER_IMAGE)
	docker push $(ROUTER_IMAGE)
	docker push $(PICOD_IMAGE)

docker-buildx-push:
	docker buildx build -f docker/Dockerfile --platform linux/amd64,linux/arm64 -t $(WORKLOAD_MANAGER_IMAGE) --push .
	docker buildx build -f docker/Dockerfile.router --platform linux/amd64,linux/arm64 -t $(ROUTER_IMAGE) --push .
	docker buildx build -f docker/Dockerfile.picod --platform linux/amd64,linux/arm64 -t $(PICOD_IMAGE) --push .

kind-load:
	kind load docker-image $(WORKLOAD_MANAGER_IMAGE) --name $(E2E_CLUSTER_NAME)
	kind load docker-image $(ROUTER_IMAGE) --name $(E2E_CLUSTER_NAME)
	kind load docker-image $(PICOD_IMAGE) --name $(E2E_CLUSTER_NAME)

docker-build-router:
	docker build -f docker/Dockerfile.router -t $(ROUTER_IMAGE) .

docker-buildx-router:
	docker buildx build -f docker/Dockerfile.router --platform linux/amd64,linux/arm64 -t $(ROUTER_IMAGE) --load .

docker-buildx-push-router:
	docker buildx build -f docker/Dockerfile.router --platform linux/amd64,linux/arm64 -t $(ROUTER_IMAGE) --push .

docker-push-router:
	docker push $(ROUTER_IMAGE)

kind-load-router:
	kind load docker-image $(ROUTER_IMAGE) --name $(E2E_CLUSTER_NAME)

docker-build-picod:
	docker build -f docker/Dockerfile.picod -t $(PICOD_IMAGE) .

docker-buildx-picod:
	docker buildx build -f docker/Dockerfile.picod --platform linux/amd64,linux/arm64 -t $(PICOD_IMAGE) --load .

docker-buildx-push-picod:
	docker buildx build -f docker/Dockerfile.picod --platform linux/amd64,linux/arm64 -t $(PICOD_IMAGE) --push .

docker-push-picod:
	docker push $(PICOD_IMAGE)

kind-load-picod:
	kind load docker-image $(PICOD_IMAGE) --name $(E2E_CLUSTER_NAME)

controller-gen:
	go install sigs.k8s.io/controller-tools/cmd/controller-gen@latest

golangci-lint:
	go install github.com/golangci/golangci-lint/cmd/golangci-lint@latest

e2e: build
	./test/e2e/run_e2e.sh

e2e-clean:
	kind delete cluster --name $(E2E_CLUSTER_NAME)

build-python-sdk:
	cd sdk-python && python -m build
